diagnosis: Day 1 baseline — no live creative data available due to API 403. These variants are pre-built using Spectatr copy rules and NSL/HockeyOne case study proof points. Activate immediately once API access is restored.

headlines.label: H1 — Pain Hook (Delay)
headlines.text: Your match ends. Your highlights take hours. Meanwhile, your fans are already on the next thing.

headlines.label: H2 — Proof Hook (NSL Result)
headlines.text: 51.8M video views. 37,000+ moments. One AI. See how NSL did it.

headlines.label: H3 — Outcome Hook (Speed)
headlines.text: Published in seconds, not hours. AI highlights for every match, every moment, every platform.

bodies.label: B1 — Urgency + Proof (NSL)
bodies.text:
NSL generated 37,000+ match moments across 80 games — automated, real-time, published to social in seconds.

No edit queue. No overnight turnaround. Fans got clips before they left the stadium.

Result: 51.8M video views. 2x Instagram follower growth in a single season.

If your league is still manually cutting highlights, you're losing audience every matchday.

→ See PULSE in action. Request a demo today.

bodies.label: B2 — Fear of Missing Out (HockeyOne)
bodies.text:
HockeyOne 2025: 9x growth in fan engagement in 7 weeks.

9,500+ AI clips published within seconds of the action. 10.6M video views. 264% Facebook reach increase. 500% surge in video views.

Their previous season? Manual highlights, standard results.

The difference was one decision.

Leagues running PULSE don't wait for the edit suite. They publish while the crowd is still cheering.

→ Request a Demo and see your matchday transformed.

diagnosis: Day 1 baseline — pre-built from Table Tennis England case study and B2B broadcast persona research. Target: Head of Content, Broadcast Production Manager, Archive Manager.
format: Document Ad (Stats Carousel) + Single Image Ad

headlines.label: H1 — Time Pain Hook
headlines.text: Your team spent 250+ hours last quarter tagging footage. AXIS does it in seconds.

headlines.label: H2 — Output Proof Hook
headlines.text: 3× more content. 105% more views. 0 extra headcount. The Table Tennis England story.

headlines.label: H3 — Accuracy Hook
headlines.text: 100% AI tagging accuracy. Every asset, every sport, instantly searchable.

bodies.label: B1 — Post-Production Cost Pain
bodies.text:
Table Tennis England's production team was uploading 5 videos a week.

After AXIS: 15 videos a week. +105% in total views. 250+ hours of post-production time saved in 3 months.

Same team. Same budget. Dramatically more output.

AXIS tags every clip automatically — athletes, actions, events, sponsors — with 100% accuracy. No manual logging. No lost assets. No bottlenecks.

Your archive is a revenue asset. AXIS unlocks it.

→ See how it works. Book a 20-minute walkthrough.

bodies.label: B2 — Archive ROI Angle
bodies.text:
Broadcasters sit on thousands of hours of footage that never gets reused.

Not because it isn't valuable — because finding it takes too long.

AXIS uses AI to tag 100% of your media library: sport, player, moment, sponsor brand, sentiment. Search in plain language. Find in seconds.

Result: More content repurposed. More sponsor inventory activated. More revenue from footage you already own.

→ See AXIS in action today.

adName: BRAND GAUGE — Sponsorship ROI — Proof of Value
diagnosis: Day 1 baseline — no live creative data. Built for VP-Sponsorship and Partnership Director personas. Addresses the #1 sponsor pain: inability to prove media value ROI to internal stakeholders.

headlines.label: H1 — Accountability Hook
headlines.text: Your CFO wants ROI proof on $500K of sports sponsorship. What do you show them?

headlines.label: H2 — Measurement Pain Hook
headlines.text: Sponsorship budgets are rising. Measurement is still spreadsheets and guesswork.

headlines.label: H3 — Outcome Hook
headlines.text: Real-time sponsor analytics. Media value, measured automatically, every match.

bodies.label: B1 — CFO Pressure Angle
bodies.text:
Sports sponsorship spending hit a record high in 2025.

But when the CFO asks 'what did we get for it?' — most Partnership Directors are still pulling together clips and estimated reach figures from rights holders.

BRAND GAUGE measures your actual media value in real-time: logo exposure, broadcast airtime, social impressions, equivalent advertising value — all automated, all auditable.

Stop estimating. Start proving.

→ Get your free sponsorship ROI report.

bodies.label: B2 — Rights Holder Angle
bodies.text:
Sponsors are asking harder questions.

'How many seconds did our logo appear on-screen?' 'What was the equivalent broadcast value?' 'Show us the data.'

BRAND GAUGE gives rights holders the answers — automatically.

Real-time sponsor analytics across broadcast, OTT, and social. Media value calculated per brand, per placement, per event. Delivered to sponsors before they ask.

Retain sponsors. Upsell confidently. Prove value at renewal.

→ Book a 15-minute demo.
